html:
Exclusive to:
The Ancient Remains are found within the Sanctum. There are three in total, and each one has a corresponding Ancient Mask located on the ground nearby.

Gallery

  • Ancient Remains with their Mask.
  • Ancient Remains Art from Rhymes with Play stream.

summaryViHtml:
Tóm tắt

Di tích cổ xưa được tìm thấy trong Sanctum. Tổng cộng có ba chiếc và mỗi chiếc có một Mặt nạ cổ tương ứng nằm trên mặt đất gần đó.
title: Ancient Remains

{{Exclusivity|Don't Starve Together}}
The '''Ancient Remains''' are found within the [[Sanctum]]. There are three in total, and each one has a corresponding [[Ancient Mask]] located on the ground nearby.

== [[File:Blueprint.png|32px|link=]] Gallery == 
<gallery>
Ancient Remains ingame.png|Ancient Remains with their Mask.
RWP AE Ancient Husks Concep Art.png|Ancient Remains Art from ''Rhymes with Play'' stream.
</gallery>
